# Super Greedy

> Automated futures trading software for ES, NQ, MES, and MNQ.

Super Greedy helps futures traders automate execution during market hours using configurable sessions, bias controls, detection modes, and risk settings. Desktop apps: macOS and Windows.

## Site

- [Super Greedy | Automated Futures Trading Software for ES, NQ, MES & MNQ](https://supergreedy.com/): Main marketing site and product overview
- [Sitemap](https://supergreedy.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of indexable URLs
- [This file](https://supergreedy.com/llms.txt): Curated summary for LLMs and agents

## Contact

- [hello@supergreedy.com](mailto:hello@supergreedy.com)

## Crawling

Crawlers are explicitly allowed for site content in [robots.txt](https://supergreedy.com/robots.txt) (including common AI user-agents).
